CREATE TABLE test_soap_requests (id INT PRIMARY KEY, request XML, response VARCHAR);
SELECT soap_server(request) FROM test_soap_requests WHERE id = 1;
SELECT soap_server(request) AS response, id FROM test_soap_requests WHERE response IS NULL;
UPDATE test_soap_requests SET response = soap_server(request) WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, soap_server(request) AS response FROM test_soap_requests WHERE request LIKE '%nestedRequest%';
SELECT (SELECT soap_server(request) FROM test_soap_requests WHERE id = 1) AS firstResponse, (SELECT soap_server(request) FROM test_soap_requests WHERE id = 2) AS secondResponse;
CREATE TABLE response_logs (log_id INT PRIMARY KEY, response_text VARCHAR, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO response_logs (log_id, response_text) SELECT id, soap_server(request) FROM test_soap_requests;
SELECT * FROM response_logs WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '1 day';
DELETE FROM test_soap_requests WHERE id = 1 AND response IS NOT NULL;
CREATE VIEW valid_responses AS SELECT id, response FROM test_soap_requests WHERE response IS NOT NULL;
